name: Lisa and Karens Fabulous Peach Crepes
recipeIngredient: 1 dash each cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger (powdered)
1 tablespoon oil or butter for frying
6 large peaches, peeled and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
For crepes: Combine ingredients in a blender or food processor and blend for 1 minute. Refrigerate for 1 hour. Using a crepe pan, coat lightly with butter or oil and turn crepes once; cook until edges just brown. Finish the rest of the crepes and set aside.
For filling: Combine cream cheese, vanilla, and sugar and blend until creamy. Assemble by spreading 2 tablespoons of cheese mixture down the center of each crepe. Place fruit slices on the cheese, dot with butter, and sprinkle with brown sugar. Fold and place in a 9x13-inch oblong baking dish, seam side down. Finish all. Bake at 325°F for 10-15 minutes until heated through.
Arrange on serving plates.
For whipped topping: Combine sugar and cream and beat on high until soft peaks form. Serve over warm crepes.
